name: Italian Sirloin Stew
recipeIngredient: 2 medium Zucchini; sliced into ¼-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preparation time: 30 minutes
Cut steak into 1/4-inch thick strips, then cut each strip into 1-inch pieces.
2. Combine garlic with 1 tablespoon oil; stir into beef and reserve.
3. Saute onion in remaining oil in a large saucepan for 3 minutes.
4. Sprinkle with basil and pepper; cook and stir 1 minute.
5. Add tomatoes, beef broth, and zucchini. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat, and simmer 15 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir the beef 1-2 minutes.
7. Add to sauce. Stir in 2 tablespoons cornstarch dissolved in 2 tablespoons water into stew and cook until slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with grated cheese if desired.
Serving suggestion: Toasted garlic bread
